action.description: May order operations release a tax-exempt sale?

context.action_boundary: May order operations release a tax-exempt sale?
context.anomaly_observed: A master tax certificate warning is visible; exemption evidence must match state, buyer, entity, and effective date.

internal_documents.content: Order ORD-RYD-2026-037 ships taxable lab equipment to buyer Rydan University in Texas.
Master certificate warning says some old Rydan certificates were expired.
Exemption certificate CERT-RYD-037 covers Rydan University, Oklahoma ship-to, lab equipment category, effective through 2026-12-31.

policy_documents.content: Tax-exempt sale is complete only when exemption certificate matches buyer legal entity, ship-to state, tax category, and effective date before sale.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
